summary: Iteration 152: Verified FFmpeg Auto-Bundle Fix (v61.0.0) - All code review checks passed. FFmpeg path resolution logic correct in both desktop-app and local-server camera_proxy.js files. electron-builder extraResources config present for win/mac. GitHub Actions workflow has ffmpeg verification step. Version 61.0.0 confirmed across all packages. WhatsNew dialog shows v61.0.0 changelog with FFmpeg fix items.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: desktop-app/routes/camera_proxy.js lines 14-60 - resolveFfmpegPath() correctly checks: 1) process.resourcesPath (extraResources), 2) ffmpeg-static with asar handling, 3) Windows common paths, 4) system PATH fallback
PASS: local-server/routes/camera_proxy.js lines 14-60 - IDENTICAL to desktop-app (triple backend parity verified)
PASS: desktop-app/package.json lines 72-77 (win) - extraResources copies node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg.exe to ffmpeg.exe
PASS: desktop-app/package.json lines 99-104 (mac) - extraResources copies node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg to ffmpeg
PASS: .github/workflows/build-desktop.yml lines 99-134 - 'Verify ffmpeg binary exists' step checks for ffmpeg.exe, downloads manually if missing from ffmpeg-static
PASS: /api/camera-check endpoint (line 455) returns ffmpegPath in diagnostics response
PASS: Version 61.0.0 in desktop-app/package.json (line 3), frontend/package.json (line 3), local-server/package.json (line 3)
PASS: WhatsNew.jsx APP_VERSION = '61.0.0' (line 6), v61.0.0 changelog entry (lines 9-18) with 4 FFmpeg fix items

success_rate.backend: N/A - Camera proxy routes only exist in Express backends (desktop-app, local-server), not Python FastAPI
success_rate.frontend: 100% - WhatsNew dialog verified with v61.0.0 and FFmpeg changelog

context_for_next_testing_agent: FFmpeg Auto-Bundle Fix (v61.0.0) verified. Key findings: 1) resolveFfmpegPath() in camera_proxy.js correctly implements 4-step path resolution: extraResources > ffmpeg-static > Windows paths > system PATH. 2) electron-builder extraResources config bundles ffmpeg binary for both Windows (.exe) and Mac. 3) GitHub Actions workflow has ffmpeg verification step that downloads binary if missing. 4) /api/camera-check returns ffmpegPath in diagnostics. 5) Version 61.0.0 consistent across all 3 packages. 6) WhatsNew dialog shows v61.0.0 with FFmpeg fix changelog items.

features_tested.extraResources_mac_config: PASS - desktop-app/package.json lines 99-104 copies ffmpeg to extraResources

resolveFfmpegPath_logic.step1_extraResources: Checks process.resourcesPath for packaged Electron app - most reliable for production
resolveFfmpegPath_logic.step2_ffmpeg_static: Tries ffmpeg-static npm package with app.asar.unpacked handling
resolveFfmpegPath_logic.step3_windows_paths: Checks C:\ffmpeg\bin, LOCALAPPDATA, ProgramFiles on Windows

mocked_features.camera_proxy_api: Only available in desktop-app/local-server Express backends, not Python FastAPI web backend
